title: Mixed Ax-Schanuel for the universal abelian varieties and some applications
abstract: In this paper we prove the mixed Ax-Schanuel theorem for the universal abelian varieties (more generally any mixed Shimura variety of Kuga type), and give some simple applications. In particular we present an application to studying the generic rank of the Betti map.
comment: Accepted to Compositio Mathematica. Comments are welcome
